verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, the blood of Jesus, Oh, the blood of Jesus, Oh, the blood of Jesus, It washes white as snow.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's power in the blood of Jesus There's power in the blood of Jesus There's power in the blood of Jesus It washes white as snow.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's deliverance in the blood of Jesus There's deliverance in the blood of Jesus There's deliverance in the blood of Jesus It washes white as snow.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm thankful for the blood of Jesus, I'm thankful for the blood of Jesus, I'm thankful for the blood of Jesus, It washes white as snow
